# Copilot Instructions

For book-writing, outlining, revision, continuity, memory-bank, or manuscript tasks in this repository, use `plugins/book-writer-light/skills/book-writer-light/SKILL.md` as the primary workflow guide.

Keep context loading compact. Prefer `book-memory-bank/Core/context_index.yml`, named target files, and task-specific references over broad memory-bank reads.
